items.title: Sources: Knicks' Robinson to play after surgery
items.summary: Knicks center Mitchell Robinson plans to play in Game 1 of the NBA Finals while wearing a brace on his hand after undergoing surgery on his broken right pinkie finger, sources told ESPN.

items.title: Dončić invests in Rome team eyeing NBA Europe
items.summary: Luka Dončić is teaming up with former Mavericks executive Donnie Nelson to bring basketball to Rome, with the team also submitting a bid to join the developing NBA Europe league.

items.title: Spurs roll past Thunder as WCF head to Game 7
items.summary: With the Spurs facing elimination, Victor Wembanyama led the charge with 28 points and 10 rebounds in a 118-91 blowout of the Thunder to send the Western Conference finals to a Game 7.

items.title: Williams ineffective in return, SGA off in OKC los...
items.summary: Jalen Williams scored only one point in his return from a hamstring strain, and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander finished with less than half his regular-season average as the Thunder dropped Game 6 to the Spurs.

items.title: Sources: NBA's BOG passes anti-tanking changes
items.summary: The NBA's board of governors voted overwhelmingly Thursday to change the league's draft lottery format, including expanding from 14 to 16 teams, as well as anti-tanking measures, the league announced.

items.title: Prosecutors allege Rozier agreed to $100K bribe
items.summary: Federal prosecutors allege Terry Rozier agreed to a $100,000 bribe in order to manipulate his performance in an NBA game as part of a gambling scheme and filed two new charges against him Thursday.

items.title: Trump plans to attend NBA Finals game at MSG
items.summary: President Donald Trump said he is planning on attending an NBA Finals game at Madison Square Garden next month.

items.title: Sources: Hawks GM Saleh gets promotion, deal
items.summary: The Hawks signed Onsi Saleh to a long-term contract extension and promoted him from general manager to president of basketball operations, it was announced on Wednesday.

items.title: 👶 Tyrese Maxey, Myra Gordon introduce baby
items.summary: Gordon and Maxey's daughter, Marvel, was born May 14.

items.title: 2026 NBA draft rankings: Top 100 prospects after c...
items.summary: After the college withdrawal deadline, a wave of returners reshapes ESPN's latest top 100.

items.title: Copy of ESPN's NBA mock draft simulator: Make picks as a g...
items.summary: Think you could do better than your team's GM? Now's your chance with our updated NBA mock draft machine.

items.title: Zagreb protiv Sesveta osvojio 34. naslov prvaka! Legendarni Gojun oprostio se od rukometa
items.summary: Zagreb osvaja 34. naslov prvaka Hrvatske u rukometu pobijedivši Sesvete! Legendarni Jakov Gojun završava karijeru uz ovacije publike

items.title: Španjolci potvrdili posao kojim je Dinamo zaradio 1.5 milijuna eura
items.summary: GONZALO VILLAR trajno prelazi u Elche nakon posudbe iz Dinama.

items.title: Poljska ljevica i danas se pamti u Dinamu: Ponosan sam jer sam igrao s Petkovićem, sjajan je...
items.summary: Izvrsne predispozicije, savršena tehnika. Kad sam odlazio iz Dinama i pitali su me tko će napraviti najveću karijeru, bez oklijevanja sam pokazao na Gvardiola, rekao je Damian Kadzior

items.title: Cirstea makes history with 6-0 6-0 win
items.summary: Sorana Cirstea continues her remarkable form in the twilight of her career as she thrashes Solana Sierra 6-0 6-0 to reach the French Open fourth round.

items.title: FOTO Rudeš se vratio u HNL! Sezonu zaključio pobjedom  nad Sesvetama i velikom proslavom
items.summary: Rudeš je povratak u HNL osigurao u pretposljednjem kolu, a pobjedom u posljednjem na najbolji je mogući način zaključio sezonu. U elitu se vraća nakon dvije godine i sezone 2023./24.

items.title: Baka i ja smo izlazili s Antom Ustašom. Na treninge Hajduka smo dolazili mamurni
items.summary: CRNOGORSKI veznjak ostavio je trag u Hajduku, a sad je gost Indexova Intervjua tjedna.

items.title: VIDEO Đoković poludio na snimatelja: Možeš li mi se još više unijeti u lice?
items.summary: NOVAK ĐOKOVIĆ se iznervirao na snimatelja tijekom meča na Roland Garrosu.

items.title: Kuss takes Giro stage as Vingegaard closes in on title
items.summary: American Sepp Kuss gains the first Giro d'Italia stage win of his career as team-mate Jonas Vingegaard moves closer to overall general classification victory.

items.title: French Open to take action against Vallejo for 'sexist' remarks
items.summary: Adolfo Daniel Vallejo is criticised for saying his French Open second-round match should not have been umpired by a woman.
